audit_items.proof_trace: For all non-assetOut assets, L650-652 enforces endingPM >= i_minPriceMultiplier and L653-657 enforces startingPM >= endingPM, together guaranteeing startingPM >= endingPM >= minPM. The assetOut exclusion (L646) is by design: when asset == s_assetOut, performUpkeep transfers the balance directly to the receiver (L350-351) rather than starting an auction, so assetOut's price multipliers are never consumed by _getAssetOutAmount. The only write path to s_assetParams is through _applyAssetParamsUpdates (L660), so there is no bypass.
